CSCSPREP
CSCS Readiness Diagnostic Test

The Blood Test
For CSCS

A blood test tells you which biomarkers are meeting the threshold — and which aren't. This diagnostic does the same for your CSCS readiness. 20 questions. 6 domains. A personalised breakdown of exactly where you stand.

⚠ These questions assess your foundational understanding of S&C principles. They are not representative of the difficulty or format of questions in the actual CSCS exam.
